_note: Coefficients for the static runtime estimate. POST /api/tasks/estimate maps task inputs (mode, fasta size, motif count, gene count, ncpu) to a predicted seconds value; the UI shows a range from estimate to 2× estimate. Tune by running representative jobs, dividing observed seconds by the formula's prediction, and rolling the per-* coefficients accordingly. Coefficients are roughly calibrated against TAIR10 + Franco-Zorrilla on a 2-cpu dev box.
